steps.action: Navigate to fixture page with widget
steps.observed: Widget button (#spikes-btn) rendered with z-index: 2147483647

steps.action: Click widget button to enter spike mode
steps.observed: Widget enters armed mode
#spikes-popover visible with + Love, / Like, ~ Meh, - No buttons
Love rating selected, comment 'Test spike for toast notification' entered

steps.expected: Toast notification appears with 'Spike saved!' text
steps.observed: Toast visible with text '✓ Spike saved!'

steps.expected: Toast remains visible for at least 2 seconds
steps.observed: Toast still visible after 2 seconds

steps.action: Monkey-patch localStorage.setItem to throw QuotaExceededError for spikes: keys
steps.observed: Patch applied successfully via page.evaluate()

steps.expected: No unhandled exception, graceful error handling
steps.observed: Widget caught error and displayed quota error UI

steps.expected: User-friendly error message appears with retry/dismiss options
steps.observed: #spikes-quota-error visible with 'Storage Full' message, Retry and Dismiss buttons

steps.action: Dismiss quota error and verify widget remains functional
steps.expected: Widget button still clickable after error
steps.observed: #spikes-btn visible and clickable after dismissing error

evidence.quotaErrorUi: #spikes-quota-error displayed with 'Storage Full' title and explanation

steps.action: Clear localStorage and submit first spike on element #cta
steps.observed: 1 spike in localStorage, 'Spike saved!' toast shown

steps.action: Immediately submit identical spike (same element, same reviewer, same comment)
steps.expected: Duplicate detected, 'Already saved' toast shown, no new spike created
steps.observed: Toast shows '! Already saved', spike count remains 1
JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('spikes:utv-ux')).length === 1

steps.action: Navigate to page with high-z overlay (z-index: 1000000)
steps.observed: Widget button visible above blue high-z overlay

steps.action: Check computed z-index of widget elements

evidence.rendering: Widget visible above test overlay with z-index: 1000000

steps.action: Navigate to admin.html with data-offset-x='50px' data-offset-y='-10px'
steps.expected: Widget button position offset from default
steps.observed: Container styles show offset applied
{ right: '0px', bottom: '30px' }

assertions.title: Review Mode Button Visible with data-admin='true'

steps.observed: #spikes-review-btn visible with text 'Review'

steps.expected: Review mode toggles on, button text changes to 'Hide'
steps.observed: Button text changed to 'Hide', review mode active
#spikes-review-btn not in DOM

evidence.indexPage: Review button absent when no data-admin attribute
evidence.toggleBehavior: Clicking Review button toggles review mode and updates button text

frictions.description: Playwright requires specific visibility handling for dynamically appearing elements (popover) - needed to use page.waitForSelector with state: 'visible' and scope element selection to popover container
frictions.resolution: Used popover.locator() for scoped element selection instead of global page.locator()

summary: All 6 UX widget assertions passed: VAL-UX-001 (toast confirmation), VAL-UX-002 (quota handling), VAL-UX-003 (duplicate detection), VAL-UX-004 (z-index 2147483647), VAL-UX-005 (offset attributes), VAL-UX-006 (review mode button)
